summary: Auto-enter rewritten as door-plane crossing test ((player−door)·(roomCenter−door)>0 AND insideDist≥0.4). CameraController now branches on enterReason: 'auto' skips setCharPos and snaps FP onto current charPos with continued yaw, giving 0.0u positional teleport (≤0.5u acceptance). Auto-exit upgraded to door-normal dot product so it works on any axis. PlayerController ROOM_MARGIN clamp opened by DOOR.width/2+colliderRadius along the door's normal axis within the door span so the player can walk back out. Walkthrough verified: entered=true, teleportΔ=0.000u, exited to overview without ESC, zero ping-pong. Pre-existing test 'keyboard flow' failure (lockedBefore=true) is from AUTO_UNLOCK_DIST proximity unlock, unrelated to B1.1; reproduces on unmodified main.
